distribution_hierarchy.location: main switchroom adjacent to KPLC intake

selectivity_cascade._note: Overcurrent: 40A Type B upstream / 16A Type B downstream (max at GH-DB) = 2.5:1 ratio, below 3:1 BS EN 60898 typical threshold — partial only. RCD: 30mA Type A upstream + 30mA Type A downstream are NOT selective (both trip on any downstream earth fault). Engineering recommendation captured in compliance_summary.assumptions: either upgrade upstream to 100mA Type S delayed RCD at MSP-100 C08, or remove the 30mA RCDs at GH-DB and rely on upstream discrimination per KS 1700:2018 §411.3.3 universal socket-RCD interpretation.

spd_assessment.location_basis: industrial site with overhead KPLC service exposure and high atmospheric lightning risk (Nairobi escarpment). Type 1+2 combined SPD assembly at MSP-100 intake per KS 1700:2018 §443 — handles both direct strike (Type 1, 10/350μs) and induced transient (Type 2, 8/20μs) waveforms typical of Kenya supply conditions.

non_compliance_flags.message: MSP-100 C08 -> GH-DB cascade is only partially selective: 40A/16A overcurrent ratio (2.5:1) is below 3:1 BS EN 60898 typical, and 30mA-on-30mA RCDs are non-selective by design. Recommend upstream Type S 100mA delayed RCD at C08 OR remove GH-DB 30mA RCDs and rely on upstream additional protection.

MSP-100 main switch Icu (10kA) is 0.2kA below the deterministic peak PFC (10.2kA from fault-level intent IEC 60909-0:2016 cascade). KS 1700:2018 §434.5.1 → BS 7671:2018+A2 §434.5.1 requires Icu ≥ prospective Isc. Recommend uprating main switch to 16kA Icu, or document cascade protection by upstream KPLC transformer fuse with explicit let-through energy analysis.

assumptions: Diversity factor 0.75 applied to MSP-100 mixed industrial load (workshop machine tools + office + compressor + gate-house submain). Imax_total = 33.2 kW × 0.75 / (√3 × 415V × 0.85) ≈ 41A — inline derivation; deterministic refinement deferred per WI3 to calc.sld_system_metrics.

Peak PFC at MSP-100 busbar sourced from fault-level intent (transformer secondary ifault_ka_max = 10.22 kA per IEC 60909-0:2016 cascade) — supersedes prior LLM estimate of 9.5kA. At GH-DB after 60m of 10mm² SWA the PFC drops to ~3.5kA — within typical 6kA Icu domestic-board rating.
Selectivity verified by manual_review (not IEC typical ratio) because the ratio (2.5:1) falls below the typical threshold and the RCD interaction needs explicit engineering judgement.

SPD Type 1+2 selected because KPLC supplies in industrial Nairobi typically have exposed overhead sections vulnerable to direct lightning strike — KS 1700:2018 §443 + KS-unique deviations index recommends combined Type 1+2 for such exposure profiles.

Gate-house DB final circuits include sockets (C02) and comms/data (C03). KS 1700:2018 §411.3.3 universal socket-RCD applies — additional protection is required somewhere in the chain (either upstream at C08 or locally at GH-DB). Current GH-DB design has local RCDs creating the selectivity problem flagged above.
No dedicated life-safety distribution at this scale. Workshop emergency lighting via local battery-pack luminaires; no central fire alarm system in this industrial occupancy.

Multi-skill intent consumption (v1.4): earthing intent at electrical/earthing/examples/ke-nairobi-industrial-tn-s/intent-out.json provides system_type=TN-S, ze_declared_ohm=0.80, supply_bond_type=tn_s_separate_pe — cross-checked against SLD supply_origin per INV-11.

Multi-skill intent consumption (v1.4): fault-level intent at electrical/fault-level/examples/ke-nairobi-industrial/intent-out.json provides system peak PFC per IEC 60909-0:2016 cascade. KS 1700:2018 §312 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2 §313.1 for short-circuit interrupting verification (direct citation form per Kenya jurisdictional policy).
tool_call_pending_for_system_metrics: true — imax_total, SPD assessment, life-safety isolation remain LLM-estimated until calc.sld_system_metrics ships.

drawing_notes: MSP-100 located in main switchroom adjacent to KPLC intake with 100A TPN main switch (BS EN 60947-3 shrouded busbars, 10kA Icu).
GH-DB at gate-house perimeter, fed via 60m run of 10mm² 4-core SWA on outdoor cable tray + buried section.
Combined Type 1+2 SPD at MSP-100 intake per KS 1700:2018 §443 — covers direct strike + induced transient.
Selectivity flag: C08 -> GH-DB only partially selective; engineering note in compliance_summary recommends 100mA Type S delayed RCD upstream OR removal of local 30mA RCDs at GH-DB.

Icu flag: peak PFC 10.2kA (from fault-level intent IEC 60909-0:2016) exceeds 10kA Icu of MSP-100 main switch by 0.2kA. Engineering note recommends uprating to 16kA Icu or cascade-protection documentation per KS 1700:2018 §434.5.1 → BS 7671:2018+A2 §434.5.1.
flags: TOOL-CALL-PENDING:sld_system_metrics — System metrics are LLM-estimates; deterministic refinement deferred per WI3.

rationale.chat_summary: KE light-engineering workshop on KPLC TN-S 415V (Ze=0.80Ω). 100A MSP-100 feeds 60m submain to gate-house GH-DB at 40A Type B + 30mA RCD. v1.4 multi-skill: earthing+fault-level intents consumed. Peak PFC 10.2kA (from fault-level IEC 60909) exceeds 10kA Icu by 0.2kA — flag Icu uprate or cascade protection. Cascade partial_selective (40A/16A ratio 2.5:1 + 30mA-on-30mA non-selective). Type 1+2 SPD per KS 1700:2018 §443. KS§312→BS 7671§313.1 routing. Reply to refine.

sections.title: Supply Origin
sections.summary: KPLC TN-S 415V/240V TPN supply, wayleave KPLC-NRB-IND-2143. Declared Ze=0.80Ω (measured 2026-03-12 by KPLC) + PFC=9.8kA. 100A main switch with 10kA Icu (BS EN 60947-3 shrouded busbars).

decisions.label: KPLC TN-S confirmed
decisions.summary: Separate-Earth cable from 11kV/415V substation 180m away. No PEN at intake. Older industrial-area supply (1987 commissioning).

sections.title: Distribution Hierarchy
sections.summary: 2-board cascade. MSP-100 in main switchroom feeds GH-DB at gate-house perimeter via 60m run on C08 (10mm² 4-core SWA, 40A Type B + 30mA Type A RCD).

decisions.label: Single MSB + remote GH-DB
decisions.summary: Gate house is 60m from main switchroom — too far for direct final circuits. Sub-DB sized for 40A intake (3 final circuits + 1 spare way).
decisions.rule: Engineering convention; voltage drop limit ≤4% on submain

sections.title: System Metrics
sections.summary: Imax_total 41A (vs 100A intake = 41% utilisation, 59% headroom). Peak PFC 10.2kA at MSP-100 busbar (sourced from fault-level intent, IEC 60909-0:2016 transformer secondary cascade) — this exceeds the 10kA Icu of the main switch by 0.2kA. KS 1700:2018 §434.5.1 → BS 7671:2018+A2 §434.5.1 requires Icu ≥ prospective Isc; the marginal exceedance is flagged in compliance_summary for the design team to address (typical fixes: uprate main switch to 16kA Icu, or rely on cascade protection from KPLC upstream transformer fuse). At GH-DB after 60m the PFC drops to ~3.5kA which is comfortable for the 6kA Icu domestic-board rating.

decisions.label: Icu adequacy flagged
decisions.summary: main_switch_rating 100A >= imax_total 41A (intake capacity OK). breaking_capacity 10kA < peak_pfc 10.2kA — fails Icu adequacy by 0.2kA. Compliance flag raised; engineering team to uprate to 16kA Icu or document cascade protection from KPLC transformer fuse per KS 1700:2018 §434.5.1.
decisions.rule: KS 1700:2018 §434.5.1 → BS 7671:2018+A2 §434.5.1 Icu adequacy (Kenya direct citation routing per KS 1700:2018 §312)

sections.title: Cascade Selectivity
sections.summary: MSP-100 C08 -> GH-DB cascade is partial_selective only. Overcurrent: 40A Type B / 16A Type B = 2.5:1, below the 3:1 BS EN 60898 typical threshold. RCDs: 30mA upstream + 30mA downstream are non-selective by design (both trip on any downstream earth fault, taking out the whole gate-house plus upstream RCD).

decisions.label: Partial selectivity flagged
decisions.summary: Verdict 'partial_selective' with verification_method 'manual_review'. Engineering recommendation captured in compliance_summary: upgrade upstream to 100mA Type S delayed RCD OR remove GH-DB 30mA RCDs.
decisions.rule: KS 1700:2018 §536 selectivity + BS EN 60898 typical ratio

sections.title: SPD Assessment
sections.summary: Type 1+2 combined SPD required at MSP-100 intake. KPLC industrial supplies in Nairobi have exposed overhead sections vulnerable to direct lightning strike; Type 1 handles 10/350μs direct strike + Type 2 handles 8/20μs induced transient.

decisions.label: Type 1+2 SPD at MSP-100
decisions.summary: KS 1700:2018 §443 + KS-unique deviations baseline for industrial sites with overhead supply exposure.
decisions.rule: KS 1700:2018 §443 SPD policy + KS-deviation index for industrial overhead exposure

sections.title: Life-Safety Isolation
sections.summary: No dedicated fire-alarm / emergency-lighting / UPS distribution at this scale. Industrial workshop occupancy — local battery-pack emergency lighting only, no central fire alarm.

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Non-compliant pending resolution of (1) the C08 -> GH-DB selectivity flag and (2) the MSP-100 Icu shortfall (10kA Icu vs 10.2kA peak PFC from fault-level intent). 2 warnings recorded. 9 assumptions documented (diversity factor, PFC sourcing, selectivity method, SPD selection rationale, KS §411.3.3 socket-RCD, life-safety strategy, earthing multi-skill consumption, fault-level multi-skill consumption + KS§312 routing, tool-call-pending flag).

decisions.label: Non-compliance: cascade selectivity
decisions.summary: C08 -> GH-DB is partial_selective only. Two compliant resolutions recommended in non_compliance_flags. Site cannot energise GH-DB at full design intent until either upstream Type S RCD installed or GH-DB local RCDs removed.

decisions.label: Non-compliance: Icu adequacy
decisions.summary: MSP-100 main switch breaking capacity (10kA Icu) is 0.2kA below the deterministic peak PFC (10.2kA) sourced from fault-level intent per IEC 60909-0:2016. Compliant resolutions: uprate to 16kA Icu, or document cascade protection from KPLC transformer fuse with let-through energy analysis. KS§312 routes to BS 7671§434.5.1 for the technical requirement.
decisions.rule: KS 1700:2018 §434.5.1 → BS 7671:2018+A2 §434.5.1 (Kenya direct citation routing per KS§312)

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: 9 assumptions captured in compliance_summary covering diversity factor, PFC sourcing from fault-level intent, selectivity verification method, SPD Type 1+2 selection rationale, KS 1700 §411.3.3 universal socket-RCD interpretation, life-safety strategy, earthing multi-skill consumption + INV-11 cross-check, fault-level multi-skill consumption + KS§312→BS 7671§313.1 routing, and tool-call-pending status.

sheets.split_rationale: Single sheet — 2 boards (within ≤8 threshold), industrial workshop with no life-safety isolation requirement at this scale

MSP-100.layout_intent_note: Main switch-panel 100A — KPLC intake, root of industrial cascade

GH-DB.layout_intent_note: Workshop/glasshouse DB feeding industrial loads (lathe + drill + compressor) via 60m submain
